en: Are you sure we want to do this? In we go!
ko: 정말 이걸 하고 싶은 거야? 들어가자!

en: Okay, we got a group of cool girls at 2 o'clock. How do you know?
ko: 좋아, 2시 방향에 멋진 여자애들이 있어. 어떻게 알아?

en: Double ears pierced, infinity scarf. Whoa, is she wearing eye shadow?
ko: 귀 피어싱 두 개, 인피니티 스카프.

en: Yeah, we want to be friends with them. Let's go talk to them. Are you kidding? We're not talking to them.
ko: 그래, 걔네랑 친구하고 싶어. 가서 말 걸자!

en: We want them to like us. Oh, yeah. Wait, what?
ko: 걔네가 우리를 좋아하게 해야지. 아, 그래. 잠깐, 뭐?

en: Almost finished with the potential disasters. Worst scenario is either quicksand, spontaneous combustion,
ko: 잠재적 재난 목록 거의 다 끝났어,

en: or getting called on by the teacher. So as long as none of those happen...
ko: 아니면 선생님한테 지목당하는 거야. 그러니까 그중 아무것도 안 일어나면...

en: Okay, everybody, we have a new student in class today. Are you kidding me?
ko: 자, 여러분, 오늘 새 학생이 왔습니다.

en: Out of the gate? This is not happening!
Riley, would you like to tell us something about yourself? No!
Pretend we can't speak English. Don't worry. I got this.
Uh, okay. My name is Riley Anderson.
I'm from Minnesota, and now I live here.
And how about Minnesota? Can you tell us something about it?
ko: 미네소타는 어때? 뭐 좀 얘기해줄 수 있어?

en: Well, you certainly get a lot more snow than we do.
ko: 음, 확실히 여기보다 눈이 훨씬 많이 와요.
